ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the session takes place */,
  "county_city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county or city where the session takes place */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the band used for the session */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency used for the session */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mode used for the session */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the schedule of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session in local time */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session in local time */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the session */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was last updated */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the session is private */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club that created the session (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_county_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_city_id") REFERENCES counties_cities ("county_city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("band_id") REFERENCES bands ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties_cities" (
  "county_city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county or city */,
  "county_city_name" TEXT /* Name of the county or city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county or city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county or city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county or city */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the county/city record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the county/city record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bands" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each band */,
  "band_name" TEXT /* Name of the band (e.g., 2m) */,
  "frequency_range" TEXT /* Range of frequencies supported by the band */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the band record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the band record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the mode (e.g., MT63-1KL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mode */,
  "data_rate" TEXT /* Data rate of the mode (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mode record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mode record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "schedule_description" TEXT /* Description of the schedule (e.g., Every Monday) */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the session takes place */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the session (e.g., Weekly, Bi-Weekly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the schedule */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the schedule (if applicable) */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the schedule is recurring */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, club leader, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the club */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the leader of the club */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the club was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the club was last updated */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the club's website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the club (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clubs_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "club_members" (
  "club_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club member */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is a member of the club */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the club */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the member (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member within the club (e.g., member, officer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the member joined the club */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the member's status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_club_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_club_members_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the user participated in */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who participated in the session */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date the user participated in the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participation (e.g., attended, missed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participation record was last updated */,
  "note" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the participation (e.g., reason for missing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_participants_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
